phrases.english: Learn with passion, grow with heart.
phrases.russian: Учись с увлечением, расти с душой.

phrases.english: Breathe in calm, breathe out stress.
Let go, and you will float.
A new day, brings new chances.
Don't give up, see it through.
I miss your smile, a lot.
My world, is brighter with you.
Every word counts, little by little.

phrases.russian: Практика ведёт к успеху, не к идеалу.

phrases.english: Small steps, lead to big journeys.
Learn one word, know one thing.
Slowly, but surely, you'll get there.
I love your voice, so much.
Learn Russian, for fun, and growth.
phrases.russian: Учи русский, для смеха, и роста.

phrases.english: Speak Russian, make friends, explore culture.
phrases.russian: Говори по-русски, заводи друзей, исследуй культуру.

phrases.english: Learn a new skill, learn Russian.
So much to be thankful for.
You're the quiet hum of my contentment.
In your eyes, I find my north star.
phrases.russian: В твоих глазах я нахожу свою путеводную звезду.

phrases.english: You're the gentle rhythm of my heart.
One step at a time, always forward.
Stars guide dreams, then they shine.
A new word learned, power glows.
Hear it, grab it, own it.
For this calm moment, thank you.
For wisdom found, I am grateful.
My soul found rest, in you.
phrases.russian: Моя душа нашла покой, в тебе.

phrases.english: Sun warms the soil. So your kindness.
phrases.russian: Солнце  греет  землю.  Так  и  ты.

phrases.english: Dewtip gleams, then gone. Cherish moments.
phrases.russian: Капля  росы,  блестит,  исчезает.  Лови  момент.

phrases.english: Moon paints silver glow. Inspire peace.
Ocean breathes silence. Find depth within.

phrases.russian: Скажи слово, смотри, как ум цветёт.

phrases.english: Your heart sings, hear its tune.
Small step forward, great, Russian journey.
phrases.russian: Малый шаг вперёд, великий, русский путь.

phrases.english: You're speaking it, bit by bit.
phrases.russian: Ты говоришь, по чуть, по чуть.

phrases.english: One word, then next, good start.
Every breath, a gift for you.
The world glows, because you do.
Seed of words, Russian forest grows.
Hear the beauty, find the rhythm.
Feel the language, touch its soul.
Just say it, unlock the door.
Speak softly, the word will bloom.

phrases.russian: Сними с сердца ношу, найди отдых.

phrases.english: One nice word, can change much.

phrases.russian: Океанская глубина, в ней твой потенциал.

phrases.english: Sky soars with your dreams, fly!
Like a clear stream, your clarity.
Stars shine, so do you, bright.
phrases.russian: Звезды сияют, как и ты, ярко.

phrases.english: You are stronger, than you think.
Your Russian voice, now is real.
Deep breath, and speak your truth.
Wild flower blooms, your words unfurl.
Sky paints colors, share your art.
Taste new words, feel the soul.
Trace the sound, find the shape.
Dare to imagine, with Russian words.
A single word, paints vivid scenes.
Like a seedling, grow your words.
Old hurts dissolve, new words begin.
Let grudges go, like stray thoughts.
Echoes shape sound, words your soul.
Breathe the word, find its light.
Breathing in the space between thoughts.
Kind word conquers, harsh is not.
Said a new word, proud me.
Open your heart, let it heal.
Sunbeam tracing across a worn book.
The quiet hum of contented breath.
The sweet aroma after sudden rain.
Every word learned, opens a door.
New grammar, like a fresh start.
Each day speaking, more fluent grows.
A quiet moment. Just breathe, dear.
New roots take hold, knowledge grows.
A question opens, a door flies.
Like a mighty oak, grow strong.
Sun on stone, polish your will.
Leap anyway, find comfort zone later.
Embrace the rhythm, find my voice.
Dare to stumble, find my way.
Feel the accent, taste the words.
Speak it clearly, grasp it now.
Each sunrise paints a new opportunity.
Embrace the quiet hum of presence.
Your kindness is a ripple in time.
phrases.russian: Твоя доброта — это рябь во времени.

phrases.english: Find joy in the unexpected pause.
Strength finds me, when I feel.
Trust my compass, find my truth.
